W-11014/12/2001 -^THR{S $f{ < f l t } ^ ] TTT? feuiui— -sfqH 3TftRfERm.3i1.fT. 578( 31) t^TF^ 23 IJSTTi 1983 % 3TJHR HRcT %TR^TST^ U=tiffVld "^t"1^ «ff tT*I? 3*ftTC ^R ^T.^TT.'R. 648( 31) fclFF 16-9-2002 SRI ^TrftKT ^ t ^ l 3X.» U / 2 W 3 ( I ) -- 1 of 2 -- '•' THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PARTII—SEC.3(J)] MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the I lth February, 2003 G.S.R. 100(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 26A of the Drugs arid Cosmetics Act 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the foliowing. further amendment in the^LOtificatibJi of the Government of Indiii. iii the Ministry ofHealth and Family Welfare number G.S.R. 578(E), dated the 23rd July, 1983, namely :— In the Table to the said notification, for serial number 29 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be -substituted, namely :— .-' '; ,:• "29. F ixed dose combination of Rifampicin, Isoniazidand Pyrazinamide, except those which provide daily adult dose tiivjii b e l o w :— [>' u gs Minimum Maximum Rjfampicin 450 mg. 600 mg. Isontazid 300 mg. 400 mg. Pyrazinamide 1000 mg. 1500mg." [F.NO.X-I10I4/I2/200I-DMS&PFA] DEEPAK GUPTA, Jt. Secy. Foot note.—The Principa! notification was published in the Gazette of India vide G.S.R. 578(E), dated the 23 rd July, 19S3 and last amended vide G.S.R. 648(E) dated 16-9-2002. Primed by the Manager.
